titleStmt.title: SII 38.101: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Ādhipuriśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 32 cows by one of the servants of the temple, Tirukāḷatti-uḍaiyāṉ alias Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa piḍāraṉ, performing the duties of Kālumpiḍārum, to burn a perpetual lamp to the deity of the uḍaiyār temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam, (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. One Vallamuḍaiyān Eḻuvan alias Nārpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉ, a shepherd at Tribhuvaṉasundarateru, received the above gift and undertook the responsibility to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4āvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟ
koṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyā
r koyiṟ kālumpiṭāruñceyvārkaḷil ti
rukkāḷattiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa kulottuṅkaco
ḻapiṭārāṉeruRead ‘piṭāraṉeṉ’Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyāṟku
vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku + Oṉṟukkum viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2
m tiripuvaṉacun=taratteruvil manṟāṭikaḷil vallamu
ṭaiyāna Eḻuvanāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉe
ṉ Ippacu muppattiraṇṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivviḷa
kku candrādittavarai celuttak kaṭavenāṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
